---
title: "Projects"
description: "OptoLAB research areas and technology demonstrators."
canonical-url: "https://optolab-unimore.github.io/projects/"
listing:
  contents: items
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  fields: [title, description, categories]
  filter-ui: true
  sort-ui: false
page-layout: full
---

The entries below are demonstrative content used to establish the site structure. They are **not presented as funded projects or validated research results** and must be replaced or formally reviewed before institutional communication.
